programme.title: Last Night in Soho Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Edgar Wright and co-writer Krysty Wilson-Cairns discuss travelling through time and recreating the past to make the ingenious and atmospheric psychological thriller.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Luc Besson's action-thriller about a young Russian assassin, with Sasha Luss. A scout offers Anna an opportunity to become a model in Paris, but can she escape her links to the KGB.

programme.title: Last Night in Soho
programme.desc: Edgar Wright's horror with Thomasin McKenzie, Anya Taylor-Joy and Matt Smith. A fashion student's transported back to Swinging-60s London. But nostalgia's not what it used to be..

programme.title: The Frighteners
programme.desc: Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Local Hero
programme.desc: Comedy starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster and Peter Capaldi. A US oil company executive tries to persuade a small Scottish seaside community to sell up their entire village.

programme.title: Last Night in Soho Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Edgar Wright and co-writer Krysty Wilson-Cairns discuss travelling through time and recreating the past to make the ingenious and atmospheric psychological thriller.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Drama. Elizabeth Taylor plays the Egyptian queen who, to protect her realm, uses political guile and her body to woo Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison) and Mark Antony (Richard Burton).

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: Blockbusting landmark sci-fi action-thriller starring Will Smith and Jeff Goldblum. A US Air Force pilot and a scientist battle aliens who are spectacularly destroying our planet.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: Action with Liam Neeson as a septuagenarian hitman; Monica Bellucci as a villain who hires hitmen to hit him, and Guy Pearce as an FBI agent investigating it all.

programme.title: Violent Night
programme.desc: A gang of violent home-invaders find out the hard way that you REALLY don't want to be on Santa's naughty list, in Tommy Wirkola's dark, violent Christmas comedy. With David Harbour.

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: Peter Mullan's award-winning drama starring Conor McCarron. Can a smart working-class teenager escape the trap of gang membership in 1970s Glasgow.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: You, Me, Garden?
programme.desc: Clara and the gardening gang visit Preston. Timur lives on his own and is desperate to invite friends around, but his garden is in no fit state. Can the team sort it.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Lady Eve
programme.desc: Screwball romcom with Barbara Stanwyck and Henry Fonda. A con artist is forced to change tack when she falls for her mark and he dumps her for trying to con him in the first place.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon
programme.desc: WWII spy adventure starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson attempt to prevent the Nazis from acquiring a revolutionary invention.

programme.title: Tobruk
programme.desc: World War II thriller. George Peppard, Rock Hudson and Nigel Green lead a daring Allied raid to destroy Nazi fuel dumps in North Africa.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Bing Crosby and Ann-Margret star in this remake of John Ford's classic western. A group of disparate strangers are thrown together while travelling through dangerous territory.

programme.title: Dream Horse
programme.desc: Uplifting fact-based comedy drama with Toni Collette and Damian Lewis. Welsh villagers club together to save up, buy a racehorse, and bring joy back to their town.
